business.name: VRK Tours and Travels
business.tagline: Car booking, one way trips, tour packages, and day packages
business.paymentInstructions: Owner will confirm the final payable amount before customer payment.
terms: Final fare is confirmed by owner/admin before payment.
Toll, parking, permit, extra kilometers, and night charges are applied as per owner confirmation.
Driver and vehicle details may be updated before trip start.
